[open] Issue #398: Stand up test harness + cover the pure utils
  Author: @mseele
  Status: OPEN
  URL: https://github.com/mseele/sve-website/issues/398

  Description:
    ## What to build
    
    Establish a working Vitest test setup wired through Astro's Vite pipeline (so @/ aliases and astro:env resolve exactly as in the production build), with happy-dom as the DOM environment and an MSW server skeleton. Extend `bun run check` so it also runs `vitest run` — tests now gate the build.
    
    The tracer-bullet proof: a full table-driven suite over `src/utils.ts` formatting functions (`formatDate`, `formatDatetime`, `formatDateCompact`, `formatDatespan`, `formatTimespan`) — single-day vs multi-day spans, date-only vs datetime variants, the 1-minute-difference ⇒ same-day branch in `formatTimespan`, the "no start or end date" throw path, German locale assertions. No mocking required — pure logic.
    
    ## Acceptance criteria
    
    - [ ] `vitest.config.ts` uses Astro's `getViteConfig` so @/ alias and astro:env resolve
    - [ ] happy-dom configured as environment; setup file starts MSW server skeleton
    - [ ] `bun run check` runs `vitest run` and fails the build on test failure
    - [ ] `tests/utils.test.ts` covers every exported function in `src/utils.ts` with edge-case table rows
    - [ ] All tests green, `bun run check` green
    
    ## Blocked by
    
    - None — can start immediately

<type>file</type>
<content>
1: import { differenceInMinutes, format, isSameDay, parseISO } from 'date-fns'
2: import { formatInTimeZone } from 'date-fns-tz'
3: import { de } from 'date-fns/locale'
4: import type { RawAppointment } from './types'
5: 
6: const DATE_PATTERN = 'd. MMMM yyyy'
7: const LONG_DATE_PATTERN = 'eee, d. MMM yyyy'
8: const COMPACT_DATE_PATTERN = 'eee, d. MMM'
9: const TIME_PATTERN = 'H:mm'
10: 
11: export function formatDate(date: Date) {
12:   return format(date, DATE_PATTERN, { locale: de })
13: }
14: 
15: export function formatDatetime(value: string): string {
16:   return `${formatInTimeZone(value, 'UTC', `${LONG_DATE_PATTERN}, ${TIME_PATTERN}`, { locale: de })} Uhr`
17: }
18: 
19: export function formatDateCompact(value: string): string {
20:   return `${formatInTimeZone(value, 'UTC', `${COMPACT_DATE_PATTERN}, ${TIME_PATTERN}`, { locale: de })} Uhr`
21: }
22: 
23: export function formatDatespan(appointment: RawAppointment): string {
24:   if (appointment.start_date && appointment.end_date) {
25:     const start = parseISO(appointment.start_date)
26:     const end = parseISO(appointment.end_date)
27:     if (isSameDay(start, end)) {
28:       return format(start, LONG_DATE_PATTERN, { locale: de })
29:     }
30:     return `${format(start, LONG_DATE_PATTERN, { locale: de })} - ${format(end, LONG_DATE_PATTERN, { locale: de })}`
31:   }
32:   if (appointment.start_date_time && appointment.end_date_time) {
33:     const start = parseISO(appointment.start_date_time)
34:     const end = parseISO(appointment.end_date_time)
35: 
36:     if (isSameDay(start, end) || differenceInMinutes(end, start) === 1) {
37:       return format(start, LONG_DATE_PATTERN)
38:     }
39:     return format(start, LONG_DATE_PATTERN) + ' - ' + format(end, LONG_DATE_PATTERN)
40:   }
41:   throw new Error('Appointment has no start or end date')
42: }
43: 
44: export function formatTimespan(appointment: RawAppointment) {
45:   if (appointment.start_date && appointment.end_date) {
46:     return 'ganztägig'
47:   }
48:   if (appointment.start_date_time && appointment.end_date_time) {
49:     const start = parseISO(appointment.start_date_time)
50:     const end = parseISO(appointment.end_date_time)
51:     return `${format(start, TIME_PATTERN, { locale: de })} - ${format(end, TIME_PATTERN, { locale: de })} Uhr`
52:   }
53:   throw new Error('Appointment has no start or end date time')
54: }
55: 
56: export function formatDuration(value: number): string {
57:   const hours = Math.floor(value / 60)
58:   const minutes = value % 60
59:   let string = ''
60:   if (hours > 1) {
61:     string += hours + ' Stunden'
62:   } else if (hours > 0) {
63:     string += hours + ' Stunde'
64:   }
65:   if (string && minutes > 0) {
66:     string += ' und '
67:   }
68:   if (minutes > 0) {
69:     string += minutes + ' Minuten'
70:   }
71:   return string
72: }
73: 
74: export function formatCurrency(value: number): string {
75:   if (typeof value !== 'number' && Number.isNaN(Number(value))) {
76:     return value
77:   }
78:   return new Intl.NumberFormat('de-DE', {
79:     style: 'currency',
80:     currency: 'EUR',
81:     maximumFractionDigits: 2,
82:   }).format(value)
83: }

(End of file - total 83 lines)

  http.get('https://example.com/*', () => HttpResponse.ok()),
)

beforeAll(() => server.listen({ onUnhandledRequest: 'bypass' }))
afterAll(() => server.close())

content.text: Several issues: I had wrong expected outputs (date-fns de short month/weekday uses periods like `Mo.`/`Jan.`; en-US month matches pattern order) plus a TZ dependency. Let me pin TZ=UTC and fix expectedstrings.
